creator: ngrundmann@gmx.de
text:
Created attachment 255657
distfile

For info:

There is a new version for eclipse available - You need to change in Makefile just the line:

DISTVERSION=    4.34

and commit the new distinfo file attached 🙂 

There is already a submit request:
https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/commit/java/eclipse?id=4b93c73af0f92b235c1a82f4b4991b29f81a124a

:-)
